description: You are the Clinical Data Manager for the Phase II Diabetes Trial (DM-TRIAL-2024). Consolidate duplicate patient records for DM-105 and DM-106 in OpenClinica (login: root / Admin123!) to ensure safety analysis accuracy. For the primary subject DM-105, schedule a 'Week 4 Follow-up' event for 2024-03-01 and record the vital signs originally found in DM-106: Systolic Blood Pressure (135), Diastolic Blood Pressure (85), Heart Rate (72), Body Temperature (36.5 C), and Weight (80.5 kg). If the Vital Signs CRF is not available, upload and assign it from /home/ga/Desktop/vital_signs_crf.xls. Mark the CRF as Complete for DM-105 and remove the duplicate subject record DM-106 from the study.
